uses: Rapuntium grande, also known as giant rhubarb, has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of anthraquinones, which have been shown to have laxative and anti-inflammatory effects. Rapuntium grande has been used to treat conditions such as constipation, digestive issues, and even certain types of cancer.
